policy: Goldie-backfilled metrics stay separate from current-Goldie KPI; no merged-FINAL.csv mutation.
diagnosis: Visible/meta PDF grounding was added and tested on five Elsevier pdf_url candidates. Browserbase rendered the ScienceDirect pages, but the proposed /pdf URLs redirected to /abs pages and no rendered/meta PDF URL was discoverable in the captured HTML.
next_action: Do not scale Elsevier pdf_url backfill until the lane can ground a real PDF-like URL from citation_pdf_url, visible PDF link, pdf.sciencedirectassets.com, or md5/pid pdfft evidence.
